# addr

Addresses that were not validated at the time of collection are often
heterogenously formatted, making them difficult to directly compare. The
goal of addr is to clean, parse, standardize, and match messy,
real-world addresses in R to use for data linkages. addr is built around
vctrs-based addr vectors, including the
[`addr()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md) vector and the
[`addr_number()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md),
[`addr_street()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md), and
[`addr_place()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md) subclass
vectors.

## Installation

Install the latest stable release of addr from
[R-universe](https://r-universe.dev) with:

``` r
install.packages("addr", repos = c("https://geomarker-io.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
```

Or, install the development version of addr from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("cole-brokamp/addr")
```

Installing addr from GitHub requires a working
[Rust](https://www.rust-lang.org/learn/get-started) toolchain; install
one using [rustup](https://www.rust-lang.org/tools/install).

## Using

addr vectors behave like standard R vectors: they recycle, subset, and
combine with vctrs tooling. You can parse text into an addr vector with
[`as_addr()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/as_addr.md) or build
one from its subclass vectors with
[`addr()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md).

``` r
addr_vec <- as_addr(c("3333 Burnet Ave Cincinnati OH 45229",
                      "5130 Rapid Run Rd Cincinnati OH 45238"))
```

# Package index

## addr

- [`as_addr()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/as_addr.md) : Coerce
  to addr
- [`addr_number()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md)
  [`addr_street()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md)
  [`addr_place()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md)
  [`addr()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr.md) : addr classes
- [`tag_usaddress()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/tag_usaddress.md)
  : Tag US addresses
- [`clean_address_text()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/clean_address_text.md)
  : clean address text

## Match addr

- [`addr_match()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_match.md)
  [`addr_match_prepare()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_match.md)
  : Match addr vectors
- [`addr_match_stage()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_match_stage.md)
  : Classify addr match stage
- [`addr_left_join()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_left_join.md)
  : Left join two data frames using addr matching
- [`match_addr_number()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/match_addr_number.md)
  : Match addr_number vectors
- [`match_addr_street()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/match_addr_street.md)
  : Match addr_street vectors
- [`match_zipcodes()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/match_zipcodes.md)
  : Match ZIP codes
- [`phonetic_street_key()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/phonetic_street_key.md)
  : Convert street names into phonetic matching keys

## Fuzzy join addr

- [`addr_fuzzy_left_join()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_fuzzy_left_join.md)
  : Left join two data frames using fuzzy addr matching
- [`addr_fuzzy_match()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_fuzzy_match.md)
  [`fuzzy_match_addr_field()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/addr_fuzzy_match.md)
  : Fuzzy match addr vectors using field-specific string distances
- [`fuzzy_match()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/fuzzy_match.md)
  : Fuzzy match

## Geocoding addr

- [`geocode_tiger()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/geocode_tiger.md)
  : Geocode using TIGER address features
- [`tiger_addr_feat()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/tiger_addr_feat.md)
  : Get s2_geography for tiger street ranges

## National Address Database

- [`nad_read()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/nad_read.md)
  [`nad_download()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/nad_read.md) :
  National Address Database (NAD)
- [`nad_example_data()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/nad_example_data.md)
  : Example National Address Database addresses

## Examples

- [`voter_addresses()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/voter_addresses.md)
  : Example addresses
- [`elh_data()`](https://geomarker.io/addr/reference/elh_data.md) :
  Example line-one addresses
